risk_title: ARTF Cancellation Due to Extraordinary Political Situation
risk_summary: The Afghanistan Resilience Trust Fund (ARTF) component of the project was canceled because the project cannot be effectively implemented under the current extraordinary situation in Afghanistan, indicating severe governance and political instability affecting project viability.
evidence_quote: The Afghanistan Resilience Trust Fund (ARTF) in the project was canceled based on the consideration that the project cannot be effectively implemented under the current extraordinary situation in Afghanistan.

risk_title: IDA Grant Suspension Pending World Bank Decision
risk_summary: Undisbursed IDA grants remain suspended pending a World Bank decision, reflecting uncertainty about the political and governance environment's ability to support project implementation in Afghanistan.
evidence_quote: Undisbursed IDA grants under this project will remain suspended until a decision is made by the World Bank.

risk_title: High Political and Governance Risk Rating
risk_summary: The project maintains a 'High' rating for Political and Governance risk across all assessment periods (approval, last approved rating, and proposed rating), indicating persistent and severe governance fragility affecting implementation.
evidence_quote: Political and Governance [Risk Category Rating]: High [Approval Package - 11 Dec 2020], High [Last Approved Rating ISR Seq. 06 - 08 Dec 2023], High [Proposed Rating]

risk_title: High Fiduciary Risk Persisting Throughout Implementation
risk_summary: Fiduciary risk remains rated 'High' across all assessment periods, likely linked to governance fragility and the extraordinary political situation preventing effective financial management and oversight.
evidence_quote: Fiduciary [Risk Category Rating]: High [Approval Package - 11 Dec 2020], High [Last Approved Rating ISR Seq. 06 - 08 Dec 2023], High [Proposed Rating]
